docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-29-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-29-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-07-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PER THE PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT PAID HER BY CHECK THIS MORNING. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEE IF CHECK CLEARS. PROOF OF SERVICE NOT VALID. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).
VIA-MAI REQUEST TO RESET SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALENCIA, PATRICIA DBA SUNSHINE INTERNATIONAL AS TO DEFENDANT NEVE, ROBERT DBA NEVE ROSES - SAN FRANCISCO FGLOWER GROWERS ASSN.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,398.28 FILED BY VALENCIA, PATRICIA DBA SUNSHINE INTERNATIONAL AS TO DEFENDANT NEVE, ROBERT DBA NEVE ROSES - SAN FRANCISCO FGLOWER GROWERS ASSN. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NO APPEARANCES. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
